sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87869" key="pro/krousis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρό-κρουσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, name of a musical phrase, Anon.Bellerm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg006.perseus-grc1:p.20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.20</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
